owner_direction.target_feel: Command and Conquer Generals / Zero Hour fused with Warcraft III at massively expanded Bloodlines scale

engine.note: Lance authorized Option B (6.3 LTS) in Session 10. ProjectVersion.txt + manifest.json aligned. First open plus JSON content sync are complete. Session 89 added the first ECS movement foundation, the 2026-04-16 bootstrap follow-up added the first MapDefinition-to-ECS authoring/baking bridge plus the first territory-yield ECS system, the next 2026-04-16 continuation added the governed scene-shell generator, first battlefield camera controller, and first debug-only ECS presentation bridge, the following continuation added the first ECS control-point capture foundation, the next continuation recovered the already-present debug command shell into continuity and upgraded multi-unit move issuance to formation-aware slotting, the next continuation added drag-box selection plus a visible selection rectangle to that same first-shell command surface, the next continuation repaired the Unity definition-binding lane by splitting ScriptableObject definitions into dedicated files, recreating all 119 generated definition assets with valid script bindings, and restoring the canonical Bootstrap scene map assignment to ironmark_frontier.asset, the following continuation added batch validation coverage for both canonical scene shells plus a combined validator wrapper, the next continuation made the governed Bootstrap runtime smoke lane green with command-shell validation, the following continuation landed the first governed production slice with building selection, building production UI, command-hall villager training, runtime-smoke verification, scene validation, and JSON sync, the next continuation added refund-safe queue metadata plus governed queue cancel-and-refund verification ahead of final production completion, the next continuation strengthened that governed production verification into a two-deep queue issue with rear-entry cancel-and-refund before surviving front-entry completion, the next continuation added the first governed worker-led construction slice with dwelling placement, ECS build progression, completion-safe component removal, and population-cap verification, the following continuation extended that governed Bootstrap smoke lane into constructed production continuity with worker-led barracks placement, post-completion militia training, a validator timeout uplift to 75 seconds, and corrected phase boundaries for the longer combined proof, the following continuation landed first-shell construction progress observability with a selection-aware construction-progress panel, a world-space construction progress bar on building proxies, a debug-API progress getter, and a governed mid-construction advancement proof that reports constructionProgressInitialRatio, constructionProgressLatestRatio, and constructionProgressAdvancementVerified in the bootstrap runtime smoke artifact, the following continuation extended that observability lane into production with a world-space production progress bar on any building with an active queue, a debug-API production progress getter, a governed mid-production queue advancement proof between cancel-and-refund and spawn, and a midProductionObservationWindow bypass on the pre-existing spawn-floor and strict phase-equality gates so live mid-production sampling can run without weakening any other bootstrap count checks, and the latest continuation landed the canonical RTS primary economy gather-deposit loop with a WorkerGatherComponent phase machine (Idle/Seeking/Gathering/Returning/Depositing), a WorkerGatherSystem that resolves movement, gather tick, drop-off targeting to the nearest owned completed command_hall, and deposit routing into all seven canonical ResourceStockpileComponent fields, debug APIs for gather assignment, faction stockpile inspection, and active-gatherer counting, a governed five-worker gold-gather cycle proof in the bootstrap runtime smoke artifact (gold rising from 45.0 to 55.0), and a StartupTimeoutSeconds bump from 75 to 120 for the longer combined sequence. Manifest still pins com.unity.collections 2.5.7 while packages-lock.json and Unity batch logs currently resolve 2.6.5.

toolchain.networking_staged: Netcode for Entities remains in scope unless Lance rules it out later (integration pending)
toolchain.package_resolution_note: manifest.json pins com.unity.collections 2.5.7, while packages-lock.json and Unity batch logs currently resolve 2.6.5

unity_lanes.description: WorldPressureEscalationSystem ported from simulation.js updateWorldPressureEscalation/applyWorldPressureConsequences. Score/Streak/Level/consequences per faction; 90s cycle gating; dominant-leader check; stage 5 convergence wired into MatchProgressionEvaluationSystem. 4-phase smoke green. Contract rev 8->9.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 8 green

unity_lanes.description: EnemyAIStrategySystem ISystem: territory expansion, scout/harass dispatch, world-pressure posture conditioning (Expand/Consolidate/Defend), reinforcement routing. AIStrategyComponent + AIStrategicPosture. SkirmishBootstrapSystem seeds component on non-player Kingdom factions. Debug surface slimmed to TryDebugGetAIStrategy. 4-phase smoke PASS. Contract rev 9->10.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 8 green

unity_lanes.description: AIWorkerGatherSystem ISystem: ports ai.js idle worker dispatch loop (1243-1251), getEnemyGatherPriorities (885-922), chooseGatherNode (924-933). Throttled by WorkerGatherIntervalSeconds accumulator (default 5s). Index-modulo resource priority rotation across gold/wood/stone/iron. PlayerKeepFortified skips stone. Nearest-node selection by Euclidean distance. Sets Phase=Seeking, AssignedNode, AssignedResourceId, CarryResourceId on dispatch. 4-phase smoke PASS. Contract rev 15->16.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green

unity_lanes.description: AISiegeOrchestrationSystem + AISiegeOrchestrationComponent: ports ai.js attackTimer<=0 siege staging decision tree (~1825-2090). SiegeOrchestrationPhase 17-value enum matches branch priority order exactly. Pure state machine reads PlayerKeepFortified from AIStrategyComponent, evaluates 16-gate priority tree, writes Phase. Field water retreat highest priority; Assaulting only when all gates clear. 6-phase smoke PASS. Contract rev 16->17.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green

unity_lanes.description: AICovertOpsSystem + AICovertOpsComponent: ports ai.js updateEnemyAi dynasty covert ops dispatch block (~2419-2678). Nine countdown timers, 31 context flags, CovertOpKind 10-value enum. TickTimers/ApplyPressureCaps/TryFireOps dispatch loop fires first expired timer with gate met. Captive rescue-first for high priority or hostile. Pact shouldPropose on succession/army/governance pressure. 5-phase smoke PASS. Contract rev 17->18.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green

unity_lanes.description: AIBuildOrderSystem + AIBuildOrderComponent: ports ai.js updateEnemyAi buildTimer<=0 block (~1377-1573). 13-step priority chain preserves ai.js if-else order exactly (Barracks, Wayshrine, Quarry, IronMine, SiegeWorkshop, CovenantHall, GrandSanctuary, ApexCovenant, SupplyCamp, Stable, Dwelling, Farm, Well). BuildOrderKind 14-value enum. Reads AIStrategyComponent.BuildTimer; on fire writes NextBuildOp and resets timer to 4s/6s per PlayerKeepFortified. Faith intensity thresholds 26/48/80 canonical. Actual attemptPlaceBuilding deferred. 5-phase smoke PASS (Barracks, Wayshrine, SiegeWorkshop, Dwelling, Farm). Contract rev 18->19.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green

unity_lanes.description: AIMarriageProposalExecutionSystem: ports ai.js tryAiMarriageProposal (~2897-2944). Consumes AICovertOpsComponent.LastFiredOp == MarriageProposal written by sub-slice 6; four abort gates match browser exactly (already-married, already-pending, no source candidate, no target candidate); candidate selection from DynastyMemberRef buffer (non-head, active/ruling). On pass creates MarriageProposalComponent entity with ProposedAtInWorldDays=now, ExpiresAtInWorldDays=now+30 (pulls from MarriageProposalExpirationSystem). Always clears LastFiredOp to None matching browser single-fire-per-timer. Target hardcoded to 'player' matching browser. Cross-lane reads only. 5-phase smoke PASS (clean create, prior-marriage block, pending block, no-target-dynasty block, no-dispatch no-op). Contract rev 19->20.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green

unity_lanes.description: AIMarriageInboxAcceptSystem: ports ai.js tryAiAcceptIncomingMarriage (~2880-2895). Consumes AICovertOpsComponent.LastFiredOp == MarriageInboxAccept written by sub-slice 6; finds first pending MarriageProposalComponent where source='player' and target=this AI faction; flips proposal to Accepted; creates primary + mirror MarriageComponent entities sharing MarriageId; MarriageGestationSystem filters on IsPrimary so only one child spawns at 60 in-world days (pulls GestationInWorldDays constant). Always clears LastFiredOp to None. Always runs [UpdateAfter AIMarriageProposalExecutionSystem]. Cross-lane reads only. Mechanical record creation only; browser-side effects (governance authority cost, hostility drop, oathkeeping conviction events, legitimacy +2 both sides, 30-day declareInWorldTime, narrative message) deferred. With sub-slice 9 landed the marriage loop is mechanically end-to-end: propose (6+8), expire (existing), accept (6+9), gestate (existing). 4-phase smoke PASS (dispatch+pending creates primary+mirror, no-proposal no-op, only-expired no-op, no-dispatch no-op). Contract rev 20->21.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green

unity_lanes.description: AIWorkerCommandSystem + AITerritoryDispatchSystem + WorkerGatherOrderComponent: ports ai.js worker issueGatherCommand dispatch (~1243-1260) and territory expansion command dispatch (~1575-1600). Worker gather decisions now add gather order plus movement and flip Seeking->Gathering; territory timer expiry now moves non-worker, non-siege combat units toward ExpansionTargetCpId and resets TerritoryTimer to 12 seconds. EnemyAIStrategySystem narrowed to target selection; WorkerGatherSystem now requires arrival inside gather radius before harvest. 4-phase smoke PASS. Contract rev 21->22 after rebase onto the sub-slice-9 master base.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green plus AI command dispatch smoke

unity_lanes.description: AIMarriageStrategicProfileSystem: ports ai.js getAiMarriageStrategicProfile (~2803-2839) plus simplified getMarriageFaithCompatibilityProfile. Runs [UpdateBefore(AICovertOpsSystem)]; snapshots player faction then iterates AI factions; computes 4 signals (isHostile via HostilityComponent buffer, populationDeficit <85%, legitimacyDistress <50 gated by faith, successionPressure from AIStrategyComponent flags) + simplified faith-compat tier from SelectedFaith+DoctrinePath equality (unbound/harmonious/either-match/incompatible). signalCount + blockedByFaith -> willing. Writes willing symmetrically to AICovertOpsComponent.MarriageProposalGateMet and MarriageInboxAcceptGate so sub-slices 6/8/9 dispatch/execute only on browser-accurate justification. Target hardcoded to 'player' matching browser. Cross-lane reads only (Population, FaithState, DynastyState, Hostility, AIStrategy). 6-phase smoke PASS. Contract rev 23->24.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green plus AI marriage strategic profile smoke

unity_lanes.description: AIMarriageAcceptEffectsSystem + MarriageAcceptEffectsPendingTag: ports simulation.js acceptMarriage (~7388-7469) post-record effects block. Sub-slice 9's AIMarriageInboxAcceptSystem now attaches the pending tag to the primary marriage entity at creation. Effects system runs [UpdateAfter(AIMarriageInboxAcceptSystem)], queries MarriageComponent + tag, applies four browser effects exactly once per marriage: legitimacy +2 both dynasties clamped 100, hostility drop both ways via HostilityComponent buffer, 30-day DeclareInWorldTimeRequest push onto DualClock singleton, oathkeeping +2 on both factions via ConvictionScoring.ApplyEvent helper (score+band refresh). Tag removed after application. Mirror record untagged to prevent double. Null-safe skip paths for missing components. Deferred: governance authority legitimacy cost (needs getMarriageAcceptanceTerms), narrative message push (no AI->UI component). Cross-lane mutations are field-level only; no schema changes. 6-phase smoke PASS. Contract rev 24->25.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green plus AI marriage accept effects smoke

unity_lanes.description: MarriageAcceptanceTermsComponent + MarriageAuthorityEvaluator + extensions to AIMarriageInboxAcceptSystem and AIMarriageAcceptEffectsSystem: ports simulation.js getMarriageAcceptanceTerms (~6327), applyMarriageGovernanceLegitimacyCost (~6232), getMarriageAuthorityProfile (~6134), and MARRIAGE_REGENCY_LEGITIMACY_COSTS (~6091). Evaluator walks DynastyMemberRef buffer to resolve HeadDirect (head_of_bloodline + Ruling, cost 0) / HeirRegency (heir_designate available, cost 1) / EnvoyRegency (diplomat available, cost 2); returns reject when roster exists but yields none of those; defaults to HeadDirect when no roster (preserves sub-slice 11 synthetic fixtures). Inbox accept calls evaluator pre-record-creation; rejection clears dispatch and skips create. On accept, MarriageAcceptanceTermsComponent { AuthorityMode, LegitimacyCost } is attached to the primary marriage entity alongside the pending tag and persists after effects apply. Effects system reordered to browser order (cost first, hostility, oathkeeping, legitimacy +2, declare time); ApplyAuthorityLegitimacyCost deducts cost from spouse legitimacy clamped [0,100] and records Stewardship -cost via ConvictionScoring.ApplyEvent. Net spouse legitimacy = min(100, max(0, L - cost) + 2). Cross-lane reads: DynastyMemberRef + DynastyMemberComponent. Cross-lane mutations: DynastyStateComponent.Legitimacy clamped, ConvictionComponent.Stewardship via scoring helper. 5-phase dedicated smoke PASS (head-direct, heir-regency, envoy-regency, no-authority rejection, terms-persisted). Sub-slice 11 regression smoke also re-run green. Contract rev 25->26.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green plus AI marriage acceptance terms smoke and sub-slice 11 regression

unity_lanes.description: ImminentEngagementCanon + ImminentEngagementWarningSystem + ImminentEngagementComponent: prompt-accurate port of simulation.js tickImminentEngagementWarnings (11742-11873). Per-settlement warning windows now activate from reserve threat state, compute keep and settlement warning durations with watchtower and tier bonuses, choose brace/steady/counterstroke posture per bloodline risk, commander presence, hostile count, and reserve inferiority, and close on expiry with WindowConsumed preserved. Dedicated 4-phase imminent engagement smoke PASS. Full rev-23 rebase validation green on the revision-22 master base. Contract rev 22->23.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green plus imminent engagement smoke

unity_lanes.description: SiegeSupplyCampComponent + SiegeSupplyInterdictionCanon + SiegeSupplyInterdictionSystem: ports the browser convoy-interdiction seam. Logistics-support buildings now carry live camp stockpiles, hostile raiders can drain the camp and interdict wagons, recovering convoys require escort screening, and the runtime writes InterdictedWagonCount, RecoveringWagonCount, and ConvoyRecoveringUnscreenedCount into AISiegeOrchestrationComponent so the already-landed AI supply phases become live. SiegeSupportRefreshSystem, FieldWaterSupportScanSystem, and FieldWaterStrainSystem now respect interdicted and recovering wagons plus non-operational camps. Dedicated 5-phase siege supply interdiction smoke PASS. Contract rev 26->27.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green plus siege supply interdiction smoke

unity_lanes.description: AILesserHousePromotionSystem ports ai.js tryAiPromoteLesserHouse (~2784-2801) plus the mechanical core of simulation.js promoteMemberToLesserHouse (~7184-7258). Consumes AICovertOpsComponent.LastFiredOp == LesserHousePromotion from sub-slice 6 dispatch. Strategic gates: faction DynastyStateComponent.Legitimacy < 90 (consolidation ceiling), LesserHouseElement buffer count < 3 (cap), DynastyMemberRef buffer present. Eligibility (browser memberIsLesserHouseCandidate parity): Status Active/Ruling, Role != HeadOfBloodline, Path in {Governance, MilitaryCommand, CovertOperations}, Renown >= 30, MemberId not already a FounderMemberId of an existing LesserHouseElement (cross-reference because DynastyMemberComponent has no FoundedLesserHouseId field; browser writes member.foundedLesserHouseId). On success appends a new LesserHouseElement at Loyalty=75 with LastDriftAppliedInWorldDays=currentInWorldDays so LesserHouseLoyaltyDriftSystem picks it up at the next in-world day boundary, applies legitimacy +3 clamped to 100 (LESSER_HOUSE_LEGITIMACY_BONUS), records a Stewardship +2 conviction event via ConvictionScoring.ApplyEvent (browser recordConvictionEvent stewardship 2 lesser_house_founded). Dispatch unconditionally cleared (one-shot pattern). Cross-lane reads: DynastyMemberRef + DynastyMemberComponent.Role/Path/Status/Renown. Cross-lane mutations: DynastyStateComponent.Legitimacy clamp, LesserHouseElement buffer append, ConvictionComponent.Stewardship via scoring helper. Deferred: per-member FoundedLesserHouseId field, promotion-history gate (LESSER_HOUSE_MIN_PROMOTIONS), marital-anchor + cadet world-pressure profiles, narrative pushMessage. 6-phase smoke PASS: PhaseSuccessfulPromotion (legitimacy 60->63, stewardship 0->2, 1 lesser house, dispatch cleared); PhaseHighLegitimacyBlocks (90 ceiling blocks); PhaseCapBlocks (3 existing lesser houses block); PhaseHeadOfBloodlineRejected; PhaseNonQualifyingPathRejected (Diplomacy and EconomicStewardshipTrade blocked); PhaseNearCeilingPromotion (89+3=92, CovertOperations path eligible). csproj refresh applied: Codex's sub-slice 4 entries (SiegeSupplyCampComponent, SiegeSupplyInterdictionCanon, SiegeSupplyInterdictionSystem, BloodlinesSiegeSupplyInterdictionSmokeValidation) were missing from local csproj after master switch and were added; csproj remains gitignored. Contract rev 27->28.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green plus AI lesser house promotion smoke

unity_lanes.description: AIPactProposalExecutionSystem + new PactComponent port ai.js pact dispatch (~2643-2666) and simulation.js getNonAggressionPactTerms (~5150-5183) / proposeNonAggressionPact (~5185-5222). Consumes AICovertOpsComponent.LastFiredOp == CovertOpKind.PactProposal from sub-slice 6; target hardcoded as 'player' matching browser ai.js:2658. Gates: both FactionKind.Kingdom, source != target, source hostile to target via HostilityComponent buffer, no existing PactComponent between them, source ResourceStockpileComponent.Influence >= 50 + Gold >= 80. Constants: NON_AGGRESSION_PACT_INFLUENCE_COST=50, NON_AGGRESSION_PACT_GOLD_COST=80, NON_AGGRESSION_PACT_MINIMUM_DURATION_IN_WORLD_DAYS=180. On success: deduct cost, remove HostilityComponent entries both ways, create one PactComponent entity with FactionAId/FactionBId/StartedAtInWorldDays + MinimumExpiresAtInWorldDays = start + 180. Single PactComponent per bond rather than primary+mirror because pacts have no asymmetric downstream system analogous to MarriageGestationSystem. One-shot dispatch consumption matches sub-slices 8/9/12/13. Deferred: holy-war pact gate (waits on holy-war lane), pact expiration / break system (browser breakNonAggressionPact ~5224 plus early-break legitimacy penalty), narrative pushMessage (waits on AI->UI message bridge, same blocker as sub-slices 11/12/13). Cross-lane mutations field-level only: HostilityComponent buffer entries, ResourceStockpileComponent.Influence/Gold. 6-phase smoke PASS: PhaseSuccessfulPact (resources 200/100->120/50, hostility cleared, pact expiry=start+180), PhaseHostilityRequired (no hostility blocks), PhaseAlreadyPactedRejected (existing PactComponent blocks), PhaseInsufficientInfluence (30<50 blocks), PhaseInsufficientGold (60<80 blocks), PhaseTribeRejected (FactionKind.Tribes source blocked). Contract rev 28->29.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green plus AI pact proposal execution smoke

unity_lanes.description: PactBreakRequestComponent + PactBreakSystem port simulation.js breakNonAggressionPact (~5224-5257). Request-entity pattern mirrors browser's explicit-only break semantic; no auto-expiration (minimumExpiresAtInWorldDays marks only the messaging threshold). Per request: find matching PactComponent by PactId, short-circuit if missing or already broken; set Broken=true + BrokenByFactionId=requesting; EnsureHostility idempotent-adds HostilityComponent entries both ways; DynastyStateComponent.Legitimacy -= 8 clamped [0, 100] on breaker (NON_AGGRESSION_PACT_BREAK_LEGITIMACY_COST); ConvictionComponent.Oathkeeping -= 2 via ConvictionScoring.ApplyEvent on breaker (browser conviction.score -= 2 mapped to Oathkeeping bucket because Unity derives Score from bucket values; Oathkeeping is both architecturally correct and semantically correct since pacts are oaths). Request entity destroyed after processing. Penalty is unconditional regardless of early-break timing; browser earlyBreak flag affects messaging only. No target-side penalty. Deferred: narrative pushMessage (AI->UI message bridge). 5-phase smoke PASS: PhaseEarlyBreak (legitimacy 70->62, oathkeeping 5->3, hostility restored, request destroyed), PhaseLateBreak (identical penalty past minimum expiry), PhaseIdempotentBreak (second break request does not double-apply), PhaseNoPactNoOp (missing PactId leaves state untouched, request still destroyed), PhaseLegitimacyClamp (legitimacy 5-8=-3->0, oathkeeping 0-2=-2->0). Contract rev 29->30.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green plus pact break smoke

unity_lanes.description: FortificationStructureLinkSystem + FortificationDestructionResolutionSystem close the browser fortification destruction seam. Fortification-role buildings now auto-link to the nearest same-faction settlement inside the ecosystem radius and materialize FortificationBuildingContributionComponent so AdvanceFortificationTierSystem sees real walls, towers, gates, and keeps in live runtime state. Destroyed linked structures now resolve into FortificationComponent.DestroyedWallSegmentCount / DestroyedTowerCount / DestroyedGateCount / DestroyedKeepCount plus OpenBreachCount, and FortificationReserveSystem now runs after destruction accounting so reserve frontage contracts immediately when a wall or gate falls. BloodlinesDebugCommandSurface.Fortification adds TryDebugGetFortificationBreachState. Dedicated 4-phase wall destruction smoke PASS: linked wall baseline tier 1/no breach, destroyed wall tier 0/one breach, intact wall+gate tier 3 with 3 reserve commits, breached wall tier 2 with 2 reserve commits. Restacked onto origin/master 0a0e122f after AI sub-slice 15 landed. Contract rev 30->31.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green plus imminent engagement, siege supply interdiction, and wall destruction smokes

unity_lanes.description: NarrativeMessageComponents (NarrativeMessageSingleton tag + NarrativeMessageElement buffer carrying Text FixedString128Bytes, Tone NarrativeMessageTone { Info, Good, Warn }, CreatedAtInWorldDays, Ttl) and NarrativeMessageBridge (static Push / Count helpers with lazy-singleton creation) port the browser pushMessage surface from simulation.js (many call sites). Shape mirrors browser { id, text, tone, ttl }. NarrativeMessageBridge.Push lazy-creates the singleton on first call and reads CreatedAtInWorldDays from DualClockComponent if seeded. PactBreakSystem (sub-slice 15) wired as the first consumer to prove end-to-end: after mechanical break effects, builds the browser ceremonial line with early-breach vs hostility-resumes suffix and routes tone via breakerId == 'player' ? Warn : Info. Append-order buffer (browser uses unshift; consumers iterate per preference). No consumer/drain/TTL-eviction system in scope yet. Global scoping; per-faction reserved for a future multiplayer slice. 6-phase smoke PASS: PhaseLazySingleton (first push lazy-creates singleton), PhaseMultiplePushes (3 pushes accumulate in append order with correct tones), PhaseCreatedAtInWorldDays (entry stamped at day 42 from DualClock), PhasePactBreakEarlyMessage (early-breach text + Warn tone for player breaker), PhasePactBreakLateMessage (Hostility resumes text + Info tone for enemy breaker), PhaseNoMessageOnBadPact (missing pact short-circuits without pushing). Sub-slice 15 regression smoke all 5 phases still PASS. Siege smoke required one retry after a transient bee_backend cache-rebuild error referencing a stale FortificationStructureResolutionSystem.cs path; retried once per 10-gate protocol and passed cleanly. Rebased onto origin/master 40e80e03 after Codex's fortification-siege sub-slice 5 wall-segment destruction landed at revision 31. Contract rev 31->32.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green plus narrative message bridge smoke and pact break regression

unity_lanes.description: Back-wires NarrativeMessageBridge.Push into the three AI systems that deferred their browser ceremonial lines in earlier slices: AIMarriageAcceptEffectsSystem (marriage accept line at simulation.js:7463, sub-slice 11+12), AILesserHousePromotionSystem (founding line at simulation.js:7251-7255, sub-slice 13), AIPactProposalExecutionSystem (pact entry line at simulation.js:5216-5220, sub-slice 14). Each wire-up follows the one-line-push pattern from PactBreakSystem (sub-slice 16). Marriage accept composes '<headTitle> of <headFactionId> weds <spouseTitle> of <spouseFactionId> <approvalText>.' with approvalText from MarriageAcceptanceTermsComponent (HeadDirect -> 'under head approval'; HeirRegency -> 'under heir regency (legitimacy -1)'; EnvoyRegency -> 'under envoy regency (legitimacy -2)'). Lesser-house composes '<factionId> founds <lesserHouseName>, honoring <founderTitle>.'. Pact proposal composes '<sourceFactionId> and <targetFactionId> enter a non-aggression pact. Hostility ceases for at least 180 in-world days.'. Tone routing: player-involved party promotes to Good, else Info. AIPactProposalExecutionSystem hardcodes target='player' so its Good branch is defensive. Member title lookup uses DynastyMemberRef with a direct FixedString64Bytes MemberId fallback (byte-by-byte FixedString.Append promotes through the int overload and writes decimal digits; direct FixedString assignment preserves UTF-8 verbatim). FactionId substitutes for display name until a Unity display-name component lands. BloodlinesAINarrativeBackWireSmokeValidation 6-phase PASS: PhaseMarriageAcceptPlayerHeadDirect (Good, 'weds'/'under head approval'), PhaseMarriageAcceptEnemyHeirRegency (Info, 'heir regency'/'legitimacy -1'), PhaseMarriageAcceptEnemyEnvoyRegency (Info, 'envoy regency'/'legitimacy -2'), PhaseLesserHousePromotionPlayer (Good, 'founds'/'honoring'), PhaseLesserHousePromotionEnemy (Info), PhasePactProposalEnemy (Info, 'enter a non-aggression pact'/'180 in-world days'). Sub-slice 11, 13, 14, 15, 16 regression smokes all re-run green. Branched from origin/master 8826d855. Contract rev 32->33.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green plus narrative back-wire smoke and sub-slice 11/13/14/15/16 regressions

unity_lanes.description: Rebased onto origin/master dfec72f5 after Claude's revision-33 ai-strategic-layer sub-slice 17 landed. BreachAssaultPressureSystem consumes FortificationComponent.OpenBreachCount after fortification destruction resolution and before FieldWaterStrainSystem. Hostile units inside a breached settlement's threat radius now gain a bounded exploitation bonus while the settlement owner is explicitly excluded. FieldWaterComponent now carries breach telemetry (advantage active flag, breach count, target settlement id, attack multiplier, speed multiplier), and FieldWaterStrainSystem multiplies that state into the existing field-water plus siege-support attack/speed resolution path. SiegeSupportCanon now applies +8% attack and +4% speed per open breach capped at 3 breaches. BloodlinesSiegeSmokeValidation now includes the new system in its validation world. Dedicated 4-phase breach assault pressure smoke PASS: intact-wall baseline, single-breach hostile bonus, settlement-owner exclusion, and multi-breach scaling with radius gating. Contract rev 33->34.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green plus breach assault pressure smoke

unity_lanes.description: DynastyOperationComponent + DynastyOperationLimits port the canonical dynasty-operation foundation every browser dispatch site in simulation.js shares: DYNASTY_OPERATION_ACTIVE_LIMIT=6 (line 17) plus the seven dispatch sites (missionary ~10523, holy war ~10565, counter-intelligence ~10837, espionage ~10876, assassination ~10912, sabotage ~10952, captive rescue/ransom ~2566-2608 in ai.js) that gate on (operations.active ?? []).length >= DYNASTY_OPERATION_ACTIVE_LIMIT. DynastyOperationComponent carries one entity per active operation with OperationId (FixedString64Bytes), SourceFactionId (FixedString32Bytes), OperationKind (new DynastyOperationKind enum: None, Missionary, HolyWar, DivineRight, CaptiveRescue, CaptiveRansom, LesserHousePromotion), StartedAtInWorldDays (stamped from DualClock), TargetFactionId (default when N/A), TargetMemberId (default when N/A), Active (false retains for audit without consuming capacity). DynastyOperationLimits static helper exposes the cap constant, HasCapacity(em, factionId) strict-below-cap per-faction scan excluding inactive, CountActiveForFaction(em, factionId), and BeginOperation(em, operationId, sourceFactionId, kind, targetFactionId, targetMemberId) creating one entity with Active=true and DualClock-stamped StartedAtInWorldDays. Deliberate departure from browser silent-trim (operations.active.slice(0, DYNASTY_OPERATION_ACTIVE_LIMIT)): Unity keeps the cap gate strict at the call site because entity-per-operation cannot silently drop entries without orphaning per-kind data and silent drop at the producer masks over-cap bugs. Callers must check HasCapacity before BeginOperation; BeginOperation creates unconditionally. No system ships in this slice; foundation ships standalone so each later dispatch slice (missionary, holy war, divine right, captive rescue, captive ransom) attaches its own per-kind component struct to the entity created here. LesserHousePromotion reserved in enum for completeness; sub-slice 13 promotion system does not currently route through DYNASTY_OPERATION_ACTIVE_LIMIT because browser promoteMemberToLesserHouse does not call getDynastyOperationsState. Cross-lane reads only: DualClockComponent.InWorldDays. 5-phase smoke PASS: PhaseBeginOperation (entity created with correct fields, DualClock stamp 12, HasCapacity=true at count 1), PhaseMultipleOperationsUnderCap (4 entities, HasCapacity=true at 4<6), PhaseCapReached (6 entities, HasCapacity=false), PhasePerFactionCap (enemy=5 + player=1, both below cap, per-faction scoping holds), PhaseInactiveExcluded (cap-worth of Active=false excluded, HasCapacity=true). Branched from origin/master dfec72f5, rebased onto origin/master a2f5e6cd after Codex fortification sub-slice 6 breach assault pressure landed at revision 34. Contract rev 34->35.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green plus dynasty operations smoke

unity_lanes.description: SettlementBreachReadout + BloodlinesDebugCommandSurface.TryDebugGetSettlementBreachReadout expose the fortification lane's breach state as one settlement-level debug seam. The readout packages settlement id, owner faction id, open breach count, destroyed wall/tower/gate/keep counts, current tier, derived reserve frontage, and aggregate breach-assault telemetry without requiring a HUD consumer to scan FortificationComponent or FieldWaterComponent directly. Reserve frontage is derived through the already-landed reserve-frontage rule rather than stored separately; aggregate breach-assault attack/speed multipliers are reduced from live FieldWaterComponent entries that currently target the settlement so the seam stays aligned with sub-slice 6's runtime consumer. No production HUD ships in this slice. BloodlinesBreachLegibilityReadoutSmokeValidation 5-phase validator PASS: intact fortified settlement baseline, single-breach pressure activation, three-breach capped scaling, missing-settlement false/default behavior, and mixed partial destruction proving walls=2, towers=1, gates=1, keeps=0, OpenBreachCount=3, tier=2, reserve frontage=3. Full 10-gate chain green. Contract rev 35->36.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green plus breach legibility readout smoke

unity_lanes.description: Bundle 1 of the AI mechanical campaign per the 2026-04-19 roadmap decision. Two logical sub-slices ship as one commit, one merge, and one contract revision bump. Sub-slice 19 captive member state: new CapturedMemberElement IBufferElementData with [InternalBufferCapacity(8)] carries MemberId (FixedString64Bytes), MemberTitle (FixedString64Bytes), OriginFactionId (FixedString32Bytes), CapturedAtInWorldDays (float, DualClock-stamped), RansomCost (float, default 0; sub-slice 24 ransom dispatch sets the canonical value), and Status (new CapturedMemberStatus enum: Held, RansomOffered, Released, Executed). Buffer attaches to captor faction entity. New CapturedMemberHelpers static class exposes CaptureMember (lazy-creates buffer, appends Held entry, returns buffer index), TryGetCaptive (lookup by member id with index), and ReleaseCaptive (mutates status in place, retains entry for audit). No consumer system ships in sub-slice 19; sub-slices 23/24 captive rescue/ransom dispatch will consume it. Browser parity transferMemberToCaptor at simulation.js:4422-4453; CAPTIVE_LEDGER_LIMIT=16 trim deferred (Unity buffer accepts unconditionally; future retention pass can enforce a hard cap). Sub-slice 20 missionary execution: first production consumer of sub-slice 18 dynasty operations foundation. New DynastyOperationMissionaryComponent per-kind component carries ResolveAtInWorldDays (current + 32f), OperatorMemberId, OperatorTitle, SourceFaithId, ExposureGain, IntensityErosion, LoyaltyPressure, SuccessScore, ProjectedChance, IntensityCost (12f), and EscrowCost (new DynastyOperationEscrowCost struct mirroring resource-stockpile fields with only Influence set to 14f). New AIMissionaryExecutionSystem ([UpdateInGroup(SimulationSystemGroup), UpdateAfter(AICovertOpsSystem)]) consumes AICovertOpsComponent.LastFiredOp == CovertOpKind.Missionary, gates on getMissionaryTerms parity (source != target, source FaithStateComponent.SelectedFaith != None, target faction exists, target has at least one ControlPointComponent owned by player, source has a faith operator on the DynastyMemberRef roster matching IdeologicalLeader/Spymaster/HeadOfBloodline/Diplomat with non-Fallen/non-Captured status, source ResourceStockpileComponent.Influence >= 14, source FaithStateComponent.Intensity >= 12), capacity-gates on DynastyOperationLimits.HasCapacity, deducts cost on success, computes per-kind terms from the simplified browser parity formula (offenseScore = operatorRenown + sourceIntensity*0.65 + dark/light bias; defenseScore = targetIntensity*0.55 with the ward-profile bonus deferred), calls DynastyOperationLimits.BeginOperation with DynastyOperationKind.Missionary + player target, attaches DynastyOperationMissionaryComponent, and pushes a NarrativeMessageBridge.Push line ('<source> dispatches missionaries of <faith> toward <target>.') with tone Warn when target is player and Info otherwise (browser tone routing simulation.js:10560-10561). Always clears LastFiredOp to None regardless of outcome (one-shot pattern shared with sub-slices 8/9/12/13/14). Browser duration MISSIONARY_DURATION_SECONDS=32 real seconds reinterpreted as MissionaryDurationInWorldDays=32f directly on the in-world timeline rather than translated through DualClock.DaysPerRealSecond. Per-kind resolution intentionally deferred. Defense-score simplification omits target-operator renown contribution and ward-profile bonus pending a faith-ward readout. Faith operator role gate substitutes Spymaster for the canonical Sorcerer role (Unity has no Sorcerer DynastyRole yet). 8-phase bundled smoke PASS: PhaseCaptureMember (1 Held entry, correct fields, DualClock timestamp); PhaseMultipleCaptivesPerFaction (3 captives from 3 origin factions, each found by member id); PhaseReleaseCaptive (status flipped to Released, entry retained on buffer for audit); PhaseMissionaryDispatchSuccess (op created, per-kind attached with ResolveAt=72, OperatorMemberId resolved, IntensityCost=12, EscrowCost.Influence=14, source Influence 50->36, source Intensity 30->18, narrative +1, dispatch cleared); PhaseMissionaryCapBlocks (cap-worth pre-seeded blocks new creation, resources/intensity untouched, dispatch still cleared); PhaseMissionaryNoFaithBlocks (CovenantId.None blocks); PhaseMissionaryInsufficientIntensityBlocks (intensity 8 < 12 blocks); PhaseMissionaryInsufficientResourcesBlocks (influence 10 < 14 blocks). Branched from origin/master ef58ec4f (after Codex fortification-siege sub-slice 7 breach legibility readout landed at revision 36). Contract rev 36->37.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green plus captive state and missionary execution smoke

unity_lanes.description: Bundle 2 of the AI mechanical campaign: two faith-driven dispatch consumers ship as one commit, one merge, and one contract revision bump. Sub-slice 21 holy war declaration execution: second production consumer of the sub-slice 18 dynasty-operation foundation. New DynastyOperationHolyWarComponent per-kind component carries ResolveAtInWorldDays (current + 18f for declaration window), WarExpiresAtInWorldDays (current + 180f for full holy-war duration), OperatorMemberId, OperatorTitle, IntensityPulse (browser doctrine bias 1.2 dark / 0.9 light), LoyaltyPulse (1.8 dark / 1.2 light), CompatibilityLabel (simplified Unity-side derivation), IntensityCost (18f), and EscrowCost (Influence = 24f). New AIHolyWarExecutionSystem consumes AICovertOpsComponent.LastFiredOp == CovertOpKind.HolyWar, gates on getHolyWarDeclarationTerms parity (source != target, both factions have committed faith, simplified harmonious-tier check via identical (faith, doctrine), source has faith operator on roster matching IdeologicalLeader/Spymaster/HeadOfBloodline/Diplomat with non-Fallen/non-Captured status, source ResourceStockpileComponent.Influence >= 24, source FaithStateComponent.Intensity >= 18), capacity-gates on DynastyOperationLimits.HasCapacity, deducts cost on success, computes per-kind doctrine-bias pulses, calls DynastyOperationLimits.BeginOperation with DynastyOperationKind.HolyWar + player target, attaches the per-kind component, and pushes a NarrativeMessageBridge.Push line with tone Warn when source or target is player and Info otherwise (browser tone routing simulation.js:10599 always-warn-on-player-involvement). Sub-slice 22 divine right declaration execution: third production consumer. New DynastyOperationDivineRightComponent per-kind component carries ResolveAtInWorldDays (current + 180f), SourceFaithId (CovenantId mapped to canonical string), DoctrinePath (captured at declaration), RecognitionShare/RecognitionSharePct placeholders defaulting to 0 (recognition system not yet ported), ActiveApexStructureId/ActiveApexStructureName placeholders defaulting to empty (apex structure surface not yet ported). No EscrowCost or IntensityCost (browser divine right does NOT deduct intensity or charge escrow; the cost is the covenant-test prerequisite). New AIDivineRightExecutionSystem consumes AICovertOpsComponent.LastFiredOp == CovertOpKind.DivineRight, gates on the simplified Unity-side parity set (source has committed faith, source FaithStateComponent.Intensity >= 80 DIVINE_RIGHT_INTENSITY_THRESHOLD, source FaithStateComponent.Level >= 5, no existing active DivineRight DynastyOperationComponent for this faction, DynastyOperationLimits.HasCapacity), calls DynastyOperationLimits.BeginOperation with DynastyOperationKind.DivineRight and default target, attaches the per-kind component, pushes a narrative line with Warn tone always (browser simulation.js:10832 always-warn). Both systems clear LastFiredOp to None unconditionally after processing (one-shot pattern shared with sub-slices 8/9/12/13/14/20). Browser duration translation continues the sub-slice 20 convention: HOLY_WAR_DECLARATION_DURATION_SECONDS=18, HOLY_WAR_DURATION_SECONDS=180, DIVINE_RIGHT_DECLARATION_DURATION_SECONDS=180 reinterpreted as in-world-day numeric values directly. Notable Unity-side departure (sub-slice 22): divine right routes through DynastyOperationLimits.BeginOperation with DynastyOperationKind.DivineRight even though browser does NOT gate divine right on DYNASTY_OPERATION_ACTIVE_LIMIT; routing is for surface consistency, browser per-faction one-active-at-a-time semantic preserved by explicit existing-declaration gate before capacity check. Sub-slice 21 compatibility-tier simplification: identical-(faith, doctrine) equality instead of browser's getMarriageFaithCompatibilityProfile tier ladder. Sub-slice 22 deferred gates: covenant-test-passed, cooldown, stage-ready, active-apex-structure, recognition-share, faction-kind == kingdom. Sub-slice 22 deferred effects: mutual hostility application against non-same-faith kingdoms, AI timer cap propagation to candidate factions, conviction event recording, resolution at ResolveAtInWorldDays (apex faith claim on success vs failDivineRightDeclaration cooldown + legitimacy penalty on failure). 10-phase bundled smoke PASS: PhaseHolyWarDispatchSuccess (op created, per-kind attached with ResolveAt=68, WarExpiresAt=230, IntensityCost=18, EscrowCost.Influence=24, OperatorMemberId resolved, light pulses 0.9/1.2, source Influence 50->26, source Intensity 30->12, narrative +1 Warn, dispatch cleared); PhaseHolyWarHarmoniousFaithBlocks (identical (faith, doctrine) blocks); PhaseHolyWarTargetNoFaithBlocks (target CovenantId.None blocks); PhaseHolyWarInsufficientIntensityBlocks (intensity 12 < 18 blocks); PhaseHolyWarInsufficientResourcesBlocks (influence 20 < 24 blocks); PhaseHolyWarDarkPathPulses (dark doctrine produces 1.2/1.8 pulses); PhaseDivineRightDispatchSuccess (op created with default target, per-kind attached with ResolveAt=280, SourceFaithId=the_order, DoctrinePath=Light, recognition/structure placeholders default, narrative +1 Warn, dispatch cleared); PhaseDivineRightInsufficientIntensityBlocks (intensity 50 < 80 blocks); PhaseDivineRightInsufficientLevelBlocks (level 4 < 5 blocks); PhaseDivineRightExistingDeclarationBlocks (preexisting active DivineRight op blocks new creation, dispatch still cleared). Branched from origin/master 0b2fd111 (after Bundle 1 captive state + missionary execution landed at revision 37). Contract rev 37->38.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green plus holy war and divine right execution smoke

unity_lanes.description: BreachSealingProgressComponent + BreachSealingSystem add the first defender-side breach recovery loop. Fortified settlements with OpenBreachCount > 0 now lazily attach a per-settlement progress component carrying AccumulatedWorkerHours, StoneReservedForCurrentBreach, and LastTickInWorldDays. At 1 Hz, the system reads the owning faction's ResourceStockpileComponent, scans live idle workers by UnitRole.Worker plus WorkerGatherPhase.Idle and positive health, reserves 60 stone for the active breach, accumulates 8 in-world worker-hours, and reduces FortificationComponent.OpenBreachCount when a breach seals. No new worker-count field was added to FortificationReserveComponent; the direct worker scan keeps the slice narrow and player/AI-neutral. FortificationDestructionResolutionSystem was narrowed so it still refreshes destroyed wall/tower/gate/keep counters but only adds newly-created breaches back into the live open-breach count, preserving sealed closures while destroyed structures remain unrepaired. Dedicated 6-phase smoke PASS: half-window progress accumulation with breaches unchanged, first breach sealed with stone 200->140, insufficient-stone block, zero-idle-worker block, intact-settlement no-op with no progress component attached, and full three-breach sealing consuming 180 stone. Bundle 2 landed on master while the slice was in flight, so the branch rebased onto cec33509 before close. Contract rev 38->39.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green plus breach sealing recovery smoke

unity_lanes.description: Bundle 3 of the AI mechanical campaign: two captive-lifecycle dispatch consumers ship as one commit, one merge, and one contract revision bump. Sub-slice 23 captive rescue execution: fourth production consumer of the sub-slice 18 dynasty-operation foundation and first production reader of the sub-slice 19 CapturedMemberElement buffer. New DynastyOperationCaptiveRescueComponent per-kind component carries ResolveAtInWorldDays (current + 20f for rescue duration), CaptiveMemberId, CaptiveMemberTitle, CaptorFactionId, SpymasterMemberId resolved from priority [Spymaster, Diplomat, Merchant], DiplomatMemberId resolved from priority [Diplomat, Merchant, HeirDesignate], HoldingSettlementId/KeepTier/WardId placeholders defaulting to empty/0 because the Unity holding-settlement and ward-profile surfaces are not yet ported, SuccessScore from simplified parity (power = 12 + spymaster.renown * 0.95 + diplomat.renown * 0.35; difficulty = 16 base), ProjectedChance clamped 0.12-0.88 from 0.5 + (successScore / 45), IntensityCost 0 (rescue does not deduct intensity), and DynastyOperationEscrowCost with Gold = 42 + Influence = 26 (RESCUE_BASE_GOLD_COST and RESCUE_BASE_INFLUENCE_COST). New AICaptiveRescueExecutionSystem consumes AICovertOpsComponent.LastFiredOp == CovertOpKind.CaptiveRescue, walks every faction's CapturedMemberElement buffer via shared TryPickCaptive helper to find a Held captive belonging to source (simplified Unity port of browser pickAiCaptiveRecoveryTarget at ai.js:3011 which sorts by role priority then renown; Unity returns first match), gates on (captive picker success, no existing active dynasty operation for the captive's member id, source has Spymaster + Diplomat operatives, source Gold >= 42, source Influence >= 26, DynastyOperationLimits.HasCapacity), deducts cost, computes simplified parity formula, calls DynastyOperationLimits.BeginOperation with DynastyOperationKind.CaptiveRescue + captor faction id as target + captive member id, attaches per-kind component, pushes narrative line with Info tone (source=player) or Good tone otherwise. Sub-slice 24 captive ransom execution: fifth production consumer of the foundation and second production reader of the CapturedMemberElement buffer. New DynastyOperationCaptiveRansomComponent per-kind component carries ResolveAtInWorldDays (current + 16f), CaptiveMemberId, CaptiveMemberTitle, CaptorFactionId, DiplomatMemberId (priority [Diplomat, Merchant, HeirDesignate, HeadOfBloodline]), MerchantMemberId (priority [Merchant, Governor, HeadOfBloodline]), ProjectedChance hardcoded 1.0 (ransom is a paid transaction not a roll per browser simulation.js:4964), IntensityCost 0, and EscrowCost with Gold = 70 + Influence = 18. New AICaptiveRansomExecutionSystem reuses the sub-slice 23 captive picker and gate helpers via three internal static methods on AICaptiveRescueExecutionSystem (TryPickCaptive, HasActiveOperationForMember, TryGetMemberByRolePriority). Both systems clear LastFiredOp to None unconditionally (one-shot pattern shared with sub-slices 8/9/12/13/14/20/21/22). Browser duration translation continues the sub-slice 20 convention: RESCUE_BASE_DURATION_SECONDS=20, RANSOM_BASE_DURATION_SECONDS=16 reinterpreted as in-world-day numeric values directly. Cost simplification: Unity uses canonical base constants without browser's renown/role/keepTier/ward scaling because CapturedMemberElement does not yet carry renown or roleId. Per-kind resolution intentionally deferred for both sub-slices following Bundle 1/2 pattern. Parallel-revision resolution: Bundle 3 originally branched from revision-38 master (cec33509) and claimed revision 39 concurrently with Codex's fortification sub-slice 8. Codex landed first at revision 39 on master 7821d74a. Bundle 3 rebased onto 7821d74a and bumped from 39 to 40. All Bundle 3 validation gates re-run cleanly on the new base; Codex's sub-slice 8 BreachSealingSystem smoke also re-verified green alongside Bundle 3. 9-phase bundled smoke PASS: PhaseRescueDispatchSuccess (op created with player target + captive member id, per-kind attached with ResolveAt=80, EscrowCost.Gold=42, EscrowCost.Influence=26, OperatorMemberIds resolved, source Gold 100->58, source Influence 100->74, narrative +1 Good, dispatch cleared); PhaseRescueNoCaptiveBlocks (no Held captives blocks); PhaseRescueNoSpymasterBlocks (only Commander on roster blocks); PhaseRescueInsufficientGoldBlocks (gold 30 < 42 blocks); PhaseRescueInsufficientInfluenceBlocks (influence 20 < 26 blocks); PhaseRescueExistingOperationBlocks (preexisting active Ransom op for member id blocks new Rescue dispatch); PhaseRansomDispatchSuccess (op created, per-kind attached with ResolveAt=96, EscrowCost.Gold=70, EscrowCost.Influence=18, ProjectedChance=1.0, source Gold 100->30, source Influence 50->32, narrative +1 Good, dispatch cleared); PhaseRansomInsufficientGoldBlocks (gold 50 < 70 blocks); PhaseRansomNoMerchantBlocks (only Diplomat on roster blocks). Contract rev 39->40.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green plus captive rescue and ransom execution smoke

unity_lanes.description: DestroyedCounterRecoveryProgressComponent + DestroyedCounterRecoverySystem extend the sub-slice 8 sealing loop into slow structural rebuild. Recovery only runs when FortificationComponent.OpenBreachCount == 0, then scans the owning faction's live idle workers, reserves 90 stone and 14 worker-hours per standard segment at 1 Hz, applies a 2x cost and 2x worker-hour multiplier for keeps, and rebuilds destroyed counters in strict Keep > Gate > Wall > Tower priority. On completion the system decrements the selected destroyed counter and restores the linked destroyed structure's HealthComponent.Current to max so FortificationDestructionResolutionSystem remains authoritative on the next tick. The slice adds BloodlinesDestroyedCounterRecoverySmokeValidation plus a dedicated wrapper, passes all 10 governed gates plus the 6-phase destroyed-counter recovery smoke, starts from revision-39 master 7821d74a, fast-forwards onto revision-40 master e73933e4 after Claude Bundle 3 lands, and advances the contract revision 40->41.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green plus destroyed counter recovery smoke

unity_lanes.description: Bundle 4 of the AI mechanical campaign: first production per-kind resolution consumer. Ships sub-slice 25 alone because per-kind resolution systems differ substantively across operation kinds. AIMissionaryResolutionSystem walks expired Missionary DynastyOperationComponent entries and applies canonical browser effects from simulation.js:5517-5588 + simulation.js:10473-10503 (ExposureGain to target FaithExposureElement; IntensityErosion IFF different faith; LoyaltyPressure to lowest-loyalty ControlPointComponent; +2 reinforcement on failure). Always flips Active=false. First consumer of DynastyOperation per-kind components reading rather than producing; establishes the resolution walker pattern. Rebase note: cherry-picked onto rewritten master (082699ab) after upstream history rewrite orphaned the original branch. Contract rev 41->42.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green plus missionary resolution smoke

unity_lanes.description: SettlementBreachTelemetry + TryDebugGetSettlementBreachTelemetry extend the fortification debug seam so one settlement-level query now reports the existing SettlementBreachReadout plus sealing eligibility/tracked state, accumulated worker-hours, required worker-hours, reserved stone, required stone, normalized progress, and destroyed-counter recovery eligibility/tracked state, target counter, worker-hours, stone cost, and normalized progress. FortificationCanon now owns the sealing and destroyed-counter recovery tick/cost constants, and both BreachSealingSystem and DestroyedCounterRecoverySystem consume those shared values instead of private copies. BloodlinesBreachLegibilityReadoutSmokeValidation expands from 5 phases to 7, adding half-window sealing telemetry proof (4/8 worker-hours, 60/60 stone, 0.5 progress) and half-window keep-priority recovery telemetry proof (14/28 worker-hours, 180/180 stone, 0.5 progress). The full governed 10-gate chain is green in D:\BLBDT\bloodlines, plus breach legibility readout smoke. Repo-state note: the directive claiming marriages, lesser houses, and minor houses have zero Unity code is stale; the retired tier2-batch-dynasty-systems lane already owns MarriageComponents, MarriageProposalExpirationSystem, MarriageGestationSystem, LesserHouseLoyaltyDriftSystem, and MinorHouseLevySystem. Contract rev 42->43.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green plus breach legibility readout smoke with sealing and recovery telemetry phases

unity_lanes.description: MarriageProposalExpirationSystem now matches simulation.js MARRIAGE_PROPOSAL_EXPIRATION_IN_WORLD_DAYS=90, MarriageGestationSystem now matches MARRIAGE_GESTATION_IN_WORLD_DAYS=280 and records MarriageChildElement plus DynastyMixedBloodlineComponent, and new MarriageDeathDissolutionSystem ports dissolveMarriageFromDeath with legitimacy -2 and oathkeeping +1 on both sides while halting pending gestation. BloodlinesMarriageParitySmokeValidation proves day-89 pending state, day-90 expiration, mixed-bloodline child generation, and death-driven dissolution. Full governed 10-gate chain green in D:\BLDMP\bloodlines, plus dedicated marriage parity smoke. Contract rev 43->44.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green plus marriage parity smoke

unity_lanes.description: The active codex dynasty parity lane now extends beyond marriage parity into lesser-house and next minor-house hardening work. MarriageComponents.cs expands LesserHouseElement with mixed-bloodline, marital-anchor, world-pressure, and defection-timing state. LesserHouseLoyaltyDriftSystem now mirrors browser tickLesserHouseLoyaltyDrift and spawnDefectedMinorFaction: daily delta combines legitimacy, oathkeeping, ruthlessness, and fallen-ledger pressure with mixed-bloodline hostility, marriage-anchor recovery or fracture, and world pressure; loyalty crossing zero starts a 5-day grace window before defection; defection applies legitimacy -6 and ruthlessness +1, spawns a hostile minor faction, and establishes reciprocal hostility against the parent. BloodlinesLesserHouseLoyaltyParitySmokeValidation proves active-anchor recovery, hostile death-dissolution strain, and day-16 post-grace defection. Full governed 10-gate chain green in D:\BLAICD\bloodlines via worktree-local wrapper copies for the path-pinned bootstrap and scene-shell gates. Contract rev 44->45.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green plus lesser-house loyalty parity smoke

unity_lanes.description: The active codex dynasty-house parity lane now covers the minor-house levy and breakaway-spawn follow-through on top of the earlier marriage and lesser-house slices. MarriageComponents.cs expands MinorHouseLevyComponent with origin parent, claim id, levy status, retinue metrics, last levy metadata, and parent-pressure tempo. LesserHouseLoyaltyDriftSystem now seeds breakaway minors with stockpile, population, dynasty legitimacy, inherited faith, and a stabilized border claim control point. MinorHouseLevySystem now mirrors browser tickMinorHouseTerritorialLevies and getMinorHousePressureOpportunityProfile: landless/dispossessed/contested/unsettled decay, loyalty threshold 48, retinue-cap calculation, pressure tempo bonuses, and militia/swordsman/bowman profile selection with resource and loyalty spend plus live ECS combat-unit spawning. BloodlinesMinorHouseLevyParitySmokeValidation proves claim creation, landless decay, pressured bowman raising, and muster-cap blocking; the lesser-house parity regression smoke also re-ran green. Full governed 10-gate chain green in D:\BLAICD\bloodlines via worktree-local wrapper copies for the path-pinned bootstrap and scene-shell gates. Contract rev 45->46.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green plus minor-house levy parity smoke and lesser-house regression smoke

unity_lanes.description: FortificationCanon now resolves breach sealing cost and labor by fortification tier: Tier 1 stays at 60 stone and 8 worker-hours, Tier 2 scales to 90 stone and 12 worker-hours, and Tier 3 scales to 135 stone and 18 worker-hours. BreachSealingSystem now reads those helpers before reserving stone, checking funding, and accumulating progress so stronger settlements take more stone and labor to reseal. SettlementBreachTelemetry and BloodlinesBreachLegibilityReadoutSmokeValidation now report and assert the tier-aware sealing requirements, and the new BloodlinesBreachSealingTierScalingSmokeValidation proves Tier 1 baseline, Tier 2 scaling, Tier 3 scaling, and mixed-tier portfolio reservation behavior. The full governed 10-gate chain is green in D:\BLF11\bloodlines; worktree-local wrapper copies were used for the still-root-pinned bootstrap runtime and canonical scene-shell validators. Contract rev 46->47.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green plus breach sealing tier scaling smoke

unity_lanes.description: BreachSealingSystem now gates repair labor to the settlement's own control-point footprint instead of a faction-wide idle-worker bucket. The system resolves the settlement's nearest same-owner control point from the settlement anchor position, resolves each idle worker's nearest control point from worker PositionComponent, requires owner match on that nearest ControlPointComponent, and only spends labor when the worker and settlement resolve to the same control-point anchor. Same-faction workers near another settlement no longer poach breach closure here. New BloodlinesBreachSealingWorkerLocalitySmokeValidation plus wrapper prove local sealing, other-settlement blocking, no-workers blocking, and non-idle blocking. The full governed 10-gate chain is green in D:\BLF12\bloodlines; worktree-local wrapper copies were again used for the still-root-pinned bootstrap runtime and canonical scene-shell validators. Contract rev 47->48.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green plus breach sealing worker locality smoke

unity_lanes.description: BreachSealingSystem now pushes one info-tone NarrativeMessageBridge line each time a breach closes, and DestroyedCounterRecoverySystem now pushes one info-tone repair line each time a destroyed counter rebuild completes. New BloodlinesFortificationRepairNarrativeSmokeValidation plus wrapper prove single-breach closure, three-breach closure, and wall-rebuild emission. The full governed 10-gate chain is green in D:\BLF13\bloodlines with worktree-local wrapper copies still used for the root-pinned bootstrap runtime and canonical scene-shell validators. Contract rev 48->49.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green plus fortification repair narrative smoke

unity_lanes.description: The fortification-siege queue is now closed through sub-slice 13. Sub-slice 10 breach-depth telemetry, sub-slice 11 sealing-cost tier scaling, sub-slice 12 worker locality, and sub-slice 13 repair narrative are all landed. The slice 12 worker-locality smoke-wrapper fixup was merged before sub-slice 13 so future locality validation is stable on master. No approved fortification sub-slice 14 remains; future fortification work now requires fresh operator direction or a lane handoff to the next arc.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: session wrap only; sub-slice 13 closed with all 10 gates green plus fortification repair narrative smoke

unity_lanes.description: The rebased `codex/unity-scout-raids-logistics-interdiction` lane is now merged to master via `dda7c25e`. `ScoutRaidCommandComponent`, `BuildingRaidStateComponent`, `ScoutRaidCanon`, and `ScoutRaidResolutionSystem` land the browser scout-raid and supply-wagon interdiction execution seams on master, while `ResourceTrickleBuildingSystem`, `WorkerGatherSystem`, `FieldWaterSupportScanSystem`, and `SiegeSupportRefreshSystem` now all respect active raid state. The full governed validation gate reran green on detached merged master in D:\BLAICD\bloodlines; temporary worktree-local wrapper copies were again used for the root-pinned bootstrap runtime and scene-shell validators, and the dedicated scout validator stayed green. Contract rev 50->51 records the lane as landed-on-master with no branch currently in flight.
unity_lanes.validation_gates: all 10 green plus scout raid and interdiction smoke on merged master
